nodes.label: Gclimb SmartThings Healthcare IoT Project
nodes.rationale: Flat-file Groovy structure chosen to replace legacy .src-nested layout; official/community separation enables certification tracking; GitHub Actions CI ensures healthcare-grade reliability through automated linting on every push

nodes.label: SmartThings Device Handler
nodes.rationale: runLocally and executeCommandsLocally flags required for local execution to reduce cloud dependency in healthcare scenarios

nodes.label: Second Brain Obsidian Vault
nodes.rationale: PARA-structured vault lives alongside code to keep knowledge in sync with milestones; device notes created from template when handlers are added

nodes.label: gclimb Healthcare IoT Hub Project
nodes.rationale: Replaces old .src-nested structure with flat files to improve maintainability and contributor onboarding for healthcare IoT integrations
